titleStmt.title: SII 9.380: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 380. (A.R. No. 224 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT HALUVAGALU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1204, Chitrabhānu, Vaiśākha, śu. 14, Sōmavāra, Svāti-nakshatra and Vyatīpāta. In Chitrabhānu, Vaiśākha śu. 14 ended on Thursday which was combined with Svāti and Vyatīpāta-yōga; = A.D. 1282 April 23; the week day is an error. The record belongs to the reign of the Yādava king Rāmachandrarāya, who is described as the rescuer of the earth from the depredations of the Turushka, the conqueror of the Hoysaḷa sovereignty etc. It registers the grant of a plot of land at Haluvāgalu to the Sthānika Jōgarāśi for the service of the god Kalinātha in the village made by Vāsudēva, the chief of the village, Nācharasa, the eight Hiṭṭu and other people. The gift was made under the orders of Pavasariya Haridēva, the Adhikhāri of Pāṇḍya-nāḍu and a subordinate of the Sainyādhipati Mahāpradhāna Kannaradēva, who was governing all the dēśas including Huligeṟe. It also records gifts made by the Nakharas and Mummuridaṇḍas for the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁ[bicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkya]nagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē ya . kallinātha namaḥ
svasti śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēsvaraṁ pa
ramabhaṭṭārakaṁ śrīmatu samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabdaṁ dvā
rāvatīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ viṣṇuvaṁsōdbhavaṁ suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ
yādavakuḷakamaḷakaḷikāvikāśabhāskaraṁ Arirāyajagajhaṁpa
jhaṁparācāryya māḷavarāyamadanatrinētra gūrjjararāya
vāruṇāṁkusaṁ teluṁgurāyasirakamaḷakaṁdōtpāṭaṇaṁ
karaghanasthāpanācāryya raṇaraṁgadhīra tura(ḥ)ṣkōpadravasamastamēdinī
mahāsamuddharaṇaikanātha hoyisaṇarāyasāmrājyalakṣmīharaṇa
yityādināmāvaḷīsamāḷaṁkrita . Adyēha śrīmatprauḍhapratāpacakravartti
śrīrāmacaṁdrarāyavijayarājyade . tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastarā
jyabhara�ranirūpitaṁ sakalasainyādhipati śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sarvvādhikā
ri kannaradēva huligeṟe mukhyavāgi palavuṁ dēśaṁgaḷa(ṁ)nēkādhiṣṭitavāgi vi
ṣayādhikāramaṁ māḍutaṁ . dharmmaprasaṁgavādalli haluvāgila śrīsvayaṁ
bhu mūlasthānakallināthadēvara tīrthakṣētradallina viśēṣamaṁ kēḷdu Ā dēvara pūrvvaśo
tramaṁ sarvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭu taṁma pāṁḍyanāḍha Adhikāri pavasari
ya haridēvaṁge nirūpisuvuduṁ . Ā haridēvana nirūpadiṁ .
haluvāgila Adhikāri vāsudēvanu Alliya santāna maṁneyagoḍa
ti jagadāḷa śrīkīrttinārāyaṇadēvara divyaśrīpādapadmārādhakarumappa
nācarasara parivāra Eṁṭuhiṭṭu paṁcamaṭha samasta prajegaḷu mukhyavā
gi . śakavarṣa 1204 neya citrabhānusaṁvaṁtsarada vaiśākha su 14 sōma
vāra svātinakṣatra byatīpātayōgamuṁ kūḍida puṇyatithi
haluvāgila mūlasthāna śrīsvayaṁbhukalināthadēvargge khaṁḍasphu
ṭhitajīrṇnōddhāra Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōganimittavāgi Alliya sthānika rā
jaguru jōgarāsige dhārāpūrvvakadi śrīkalidēvargge śotramaṁ sarvvana
masyavāgi biṭṭaru . ḥ . haluvāgila paṁneraḍaṟalliyāṟu kai gadde
bedalu khaṁḍḍu . nakharamuṁmuridaṁḍamukhya baṇaṁjigaruṁ koṭadu
savucigeyaṁbhattu . mū taḥpurādhipati sā yiganā
ykanu dēvarige voṁdu koṭṭa Ā puradoḷage voṁdu gāṇamaṁ
dēvarige naṁdādīvigege svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti va
suṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇāṁ viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . priya
diṁdiṁtidaneyde kāyva puruṣaṁgāyuṁ jayaṁ śrīyumakke
yidaṁ kāyade kāyva pāpige (.) kurukṣētraṁgaḷoḷu vāraṇā
siyoḷeḷkōṭimunīndraṁ kavileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁdudonda
yasaṁ sārdduguvendu sāridapudī saiḷākṣaraṁ dhātriyoḷu .
Digital edition of SII 9.380 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
